title: I Want to Share My Dream

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm passing through the shopping
district, I see Silence Suzuka wandering about
with a letter in her hand.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: S-Speeee! Sigh. Where could she have gone?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I thought she was somewhere around the post
office...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe! I came to deliver this to you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You brought the envelope, but forgot the letter
itself...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What? I did?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week hurriedly takes the envelope from
her pocket and checks inside.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's empty! Yikes, I'm sorry for making you come
all the way out here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And thanks! You saved my bacon! I don't know
what my mom would have made of just the
envelope.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's not a problem. I'm glad I found you before
you sent it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But... there's something I need to apologize to
you about.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When I picked your letter up off the floor, I
happened to see a little bit of what you wrote.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I didn't mean to read it... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um. When you say "a little bit," how much did you
actually read?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The first three lines or so? You said you found a
senior student to look up to...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You were happy that you found a dream aside
from becoming the best racer in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And the world seemed brighter somehow. You
said that you're glad you met me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You read all that?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I'm not mad or anything! Actually, I'm
grateful you brought this letter to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's just that, I didn't intend for you to see the
contents. It's kind of...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's the truth, and I'm always saying pretty
much what's in this letter to you in person...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But it's still a little embarrassing! Haha...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...But you know, I'm happy. The reason it took me
so long to stop reading was because your words
warmed my heart...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for giving me your admiration, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you as well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Let me treat you to something as thanks
for delivering the letter!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There's a Hokkaido food fair taking place near
the station. A miso ramen place from back home
has set up shop there!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, a shop from your hometown... That sounds
interesting, but are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two dear friends walked toward the
station in good spirits.
